scripts.dev:ui: cd apps/swarm-ui && SWARM_UI_MANAGE_DAEMON=0 bunx tauri dev
scripts.build: node scripts/generate-protocol-types.mjs && esbuild src/cli.ts src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outdir=dist --packages=external --loader:.sql=text --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node'
scripts.check:ui: cd apps/swarm-ui && bun run check && bun run build
scripts.test: node scripts/generate-protocol-types.mjs && bun test && python3 -m unittest integrations.hermes.test_lifecycle integrations._shared.test_swarm_hook_core
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run check:ui && bun run test:server && bun run test:tauri
